questions.q: Which of the following rulers is credited with laying the foundation of Vijayanagara Empire?
questions.explanation: Bukka Raya I is credited with laying the foundation of Vijayanagara Empire, but it was Harihara I who initially started the process but it was Bukka who is credited with building the foundations.

questions.q: What was the name of the fort that served as the capital of the Vijayanagara Empire?
questions.explanation: Hampi served as the capital of the Vijayanagara Empire.

questions.q: Which of the following rulers is known for his military campaigns against the Deccan Sultanates?
questions.explanation: Krishnadeva Raya is known for his military campaigns against the Deccan Sultanates.

questions.q: What was the name of the Vijayanagara king who was a great patron of art and architecture?
questions.explanation: Krishnadeva Raya was a great patron of art and architecture.

questions.q: Which of the following temples is a famous example of Vijayanagara architecture?
questions.explanation: Vitthala Temple is a famous example of Vijayanagara architecture.

questions.q: What was the name of the Vijayanagara king who was defeated by the Deccan Sultanates in the Battle of Talikota?
questions.explanation: Aliya Rama Raya was defeated by the Deccan Sultanates in the Battle of Talikota.

questions.q: Which of the following was a major factor that contributed to the decline of the Vijayanagara Empire?
questions.explanation: All of the above factors contributed to the decline of the Vijayanagara Empire.

questions.q: What was the name of the Vijayanagara king who was a great patron of learning and literature?
questions.explanation: Krishnadeva Raya was a great patron of learning and literature.

questions.q: Which of the following was a major trade center of the Vijayanagara Empire?
questions.explanation: Hampi was a major trade center of the Vijayanagara Empire.

questions.q: What was the name of the Vijayanagara king who was known for his military campaigns against the Bahamani Sultanate?
questions.explanation: Krishnadeva Raya was known for his military campaigns against the Bahamani Sultanate.

questions.q: Which of the following was a major source of revenue for the Vijayanagara Empire?
questions.explanation: All of the above were major sources of revenue for the Vijayanagara Empire.

questions.q: What was the name of the Vijayanagara king who was defeated by the Adil Shahi Sultanate in the Battle of Raichur?
questions.explanation: Aliya Rama Raya was defeated by the Adil Shahi Sultanate in the Battle of Raichur.

questions.q: Which of the following was a major factor that contributed to the rise of the Deccan Sultanates?
opts: (A) Weak leadership of the Vijayanagara Empire
(B) External invasions by the Delhi Sultanate
(C) Economic decline of the Vijayanagara Empire
questions.explanation: All of the above factors contributed to the rise of the Deccan Sultanates.

questions.q: What was the name of the Vijayanagara king who was a great patron of art and architecture, and also a skilled diplomat?
questions.explanation: Krishnadeva Raya was a great patron of art and architecture, and also a skilled diplomat.

questions.q: Which of the following was a major consequence of the Battle of Talikota?
opts: (A) The Vijayanagara Empire was defeated and the Deccan Sultanates were victorious
(B) The Vijayanagara Empire was victorious and the Deccan Sultanates were defeated
(C) The Vijayanagara Empire was weakened but not defeated
(D) The Deccan Sultanates were weakened but not defeated
questions.explanation: The Vijayanagara Empire was defeated and the Deccan Sultanates were victorious in the Battle of Talikota.

questions.q: What was the name of the Vijayanagara king who was known for his military campaigns against the Ummayad Caliphate?
questions.explanation: Krishnadeva Raya was known for his military campaigns against the Ummayad Caliphate.

questions.q: Which of the following was a major source of income for the Vijayanagara Empire?
questions.explanation: All of the above were major sources of income for the Vijayanagara Empire.

questions.q: What was the name of the Vijayanagara king who was a great patron of learning and literature, and also a skilled diplomat?
questions.explanation: Krishnadeva Raya was a great patron of learning and literature, and also a skilled diplomat.

questions.q: Which of the following was a major consequence of the decline of the Vijayanagara Empire?
opts: (A) The rise of the Deccan Sultanates
(B) The rise of the Mughal Empire
(C) The rise of the Maratha Empire
questions.explanation: All of the above were major consequences of the decline of the Vijayanagara Empire.

questions.q: What was the name of the Vijayanagara king who was known for his military campaigns against the Gujarat Sultanate?
questions.explanation: Krishnadeva Raya was known for his military campaigns against the Gujarat Sultanate.

questions.q: Which of the following was a major source of revenue for the Vijayanagara Empire during the 15th century?
questions.explanation: Taxation was a major source of revenue for the Vijayanagara Empire during the 15th century.
